shared_mechanism: weak/wave-turbulence closure: a wave-kinetic (Boltzmann-type) equation for the spectral energy density derived from resonant multi-wave interactions, admitting Kolmogorov-Zakharov power-law stationary spectra
brief_reason: The wind-wave energy spectrum in oceanography evolves via Hasselmann's kinetic equation, assembled from resonant wave-wave interactions just like the three-wave kinetic equations for the MHD spectral densities here; both are instances of Zakharov weak-turbulence theory yielding exact power-law spectra.
